issues.message: STATE.md is stale — shows "" but derived state is "executing"
5 critical GSD runtime pattern(s) missing from .gitignore: .gsd/activity/, .gsd/runtime/, .gsd/auto.lock, .gsd/gsd.db, .gsd/completed-units.json
1 planning file(s) exceed 100KB — largest: .gsd/milestones/M001/M001-RESEARCH.md (124KB). Large files cause LLM context pressure.
